title: Service Inquiry into the death of a soldier while driving a MAN Support Vehicle 6 tonne truck near Sennybridge Training Area on 20 September 2023
body: "A Service Inquiry has been completed into the death of a soldier while driving a MAN Support Vehicle 6 tonne truck near Sennybridge Training Area on 20 September 2023.  The final report has been published to inform the military Chain of Command and the public of the findings of the inquiry and its recommendations to improve defence safety. "
